name: @tao/desktop
description: A performance-first workspace terminal powered by Electron and xterm.js WebGL
author: Tao Contributors

scripts.bench:latency:budget: TAO_LATENCY_BENCH_MANAGED_TAOD=1 TAO_LATENCY_BENCH_ENFORCE=1 TAO_LATENCY_BENCH_SAMPLES=60 TAO_LATENCY_MAX_P50_MS=40 TAO_LATENCY_MAX_P95_MS=120 TAO_LATENCY_MAX_P99_MS=180 TAO_LATENCY_MAX_MAX_MS=250 tsx bench/latency-taod.ts
scripts.bench:input-priority:budget: TAO_INPUT_PRIORITY_ENFORCE=1 TAO_INPUT_PRIORITY_SAMPLES=20 TAO_INPUT_PRIORITY_FLOOD_BYTES=8388608 TAO_INPUT_PRIORITY_MAX_P50_MS=250 TAO_INPUT_PRIORITY_MAX_P95_MS=500 TAO_INPUT_PRIORITY_MAX_MAX_MS=1000 TAO_INPUT_PRIORITY_MIN_SLOW_DROPS=1 tsx bench/input-priority-benchmark.ts
scripts.bench:attach:budget: TAO_ATTACH_REPLAY_ENFORCE=1 TAO_ATTACH_REPLAY_BYTES=1048576 TAO_ATTACH_MAX_RESPONSE_MS=250 TAO_ATTACH_MAX_SNAPSHOT_MS=100 TAO_ATTACH_MAX_REPLAY_MS=500 tsx bench/attach-replay-benchmark.ts
scripts.bench:workspace:budget: TAO_WORKSPACE_BENCH_ENFORCE=1 TAO_WORKSPACE_BENCH_FILES=5000 TAO_WORKSPACE_MAX_BRANCHES_MS=500 TAO_WORKSPACE_MAX_STATUS_MS=1000 TAO_WORKSPACE_MAX_FILE_TREE_MS=2500 TAO_WORKSPACE_MAX_DIFF_MS=1000 TAO_WORKSPACE_MAX_PORTS_MS=3000 TAO_WORKSPACE_MAX_PR_MS=2000 tsx bench/workspace-metadata-benchmark.ts
scripts.bench:workspace:large:budget: TAO_WORKSPACE_BENCH_ENFORCE=1 TAO_WORKSPACE_BENCH_FILES=50000 TAO_WORKSPACE_MAX_BRANCHES_MS=500 TAO_WORKSPACE_MAX_STATUS_MS=1000 TAO_WORKSPACE_MAX_FILE_TREE_MS=1000 TAO_WORKSPACE_MAX_DIFF_MS=1000 TAO_WORKSPACE_MAX_PORTS_MS=3000 TAO_WORKSPACE_MAX_PR_MS=2000 tsx bench/workspace-metadata-benchmark.ts
scripts.bench:workspace:xl:budget: TAO_WORKSPACE_BENCH_ENFORCE=1 TAO_WORKSPACE_BENCH_FILES=250000 TAO_WORKSPACE_BENCH_GIT_TIMEOUT_MS=180000 TAO_WORKSPACE_MAX_BRANCHES_MS=500 TAO_WORKSPACE_MAX_STATUS_MS=2500 TAO_WORKSPACE_MAX_FILE_TREE_MS=2500 TAO_WORKSPACE_MAX_DIFF_MS=2500 TAO_WORKSPACE_MAX_PORTS_MS=3000 TAO_WORKSPACE_MAX_PR_MS=2000 tsx bench/workspace-metadata-benchmark.ts
scripts.bench:soak:budget: TAO_SOAK_ENFORCE=1 TAO_SOAK_ITERATIONS=5 TAO_SOAK_BYTES=524288 TAO_SOAK_MAX_RSS_GROWTH_KB=65536 TAO_SOAK_MAX_ITERATION_MS=5000 TAO_SOAK_MAX_PENDING_OUTPUT_BYTES=0 TAO_SOAK_MAX_ACTIVE_SUBSCRIBERS=0 tsx bench/taod-soak-benchmark.ts
scripts.bench:renderer-combined:budget: TAO_COMBINED_RENDERER_ENFORCE=1 TAO_COMBINED_RENDERER_FILES=25000 TAO_COMBINED_RENDERER_DIFF_FILES=24 TAO_COMBINED_RENDERER_MOUNTED_DIFF_FILES=12 TAO_COMBINED_RENDERER_DIFF_LINES=40 TAO_COMBINED_RENDERER_TERMINAL_MIB=2 TAO_COMBINED_RENDERER_MAX_DURATION_MS=10000 TAO_COMBINED_RENDERER_MIN_MBPS=2 TAO_COMBINED_RENDERER_MAX_P95_FRAME_MS=80 TAO_COMBINED_RENDERER_MAX_FRAME_MS=300 TAO_COMBINED_RENDERER_MAX_FRAMES_OVER_16=120 TAO_COMBINED_RENDERER_MAX_FRAMES_OVER_50=8 TAO_COMBINED_RENDERER_MAX_DOM_NODES=12000 tsx bench/run-electron.ts bench/combined-renderer-benchmark.ts
scripts.bench:file-tree:budget: TAO_FILE_TREE_BENCH_ENFORCE=1 TAO_FILE_TREE_BENCH_FILES=50000 TAO_FILE_TREE_MAX_RESET_MS=100 TAO_FILE_TREE_MAX_FRAME_MS=150 TAO_FILE_TREE_MAX_DOM_NODES=750 tsx bench/run-electron.ts bench/file-tree-renderer-benchmark.ts
scripts.bench:file-tree:xl:budget: TAO_FILE_TREE_BENCH_ENFORCE=1 TAO_FILE_TREE_BENCH_FILES=250000 TAO_FILE_TREE_MAX_RESET_MS=300 TAO_FILE_TREE_MAX_FRAME_MS=350 TAO_FILE_TREE_MAX_DOM_NODES=750 tsx bench/run-electron.ts bench/file-tree-renderer-benchmark.ts
scripts.bench:reload:budget: TAO_ELECTRON_SMOKE_RELOAD=1 TAO_ELECTRON_SMOKE_RELOAD_SESSIONS=2 TAO_ELECTRON_SMOKE_OUTPUT_BYTES=4096 TAO_ELECTRON_SMOKE_OUTPUT_TIMEOUT_MS=15000 TAO_ELECTRON_SMOKE_TIMEOUT_MS=25000 TAO_ELECTRON_SMOKE_PROCESS_TIMEOUT_MS=30000 TAO_ELECTRON_SMOKE_MIN_THROUGHPUT_BYTES_PER_SEC=1024 TAO_ELECTRON_SMOKE_MAX_PENDING_OUTPUT_BYTES=65536 TAO_ELECTRON_SMOKE_MAX_RELOAD_MS=8000 TAO_ELECTRON_SMOKE_MAX_RELOAD_ATTACH_MS=5000 TAO_ELECTRON_SMOKE_MAX_RELOAD_ECHO_MS=1000 tsx ../../scripts/package-smoke.ts
scripts.bench:ipc:budget: TAO_IPC_BENCH_ENFORCE=1 TAO_IPC_BENCH_MB=16 TAO_IPC_BENCH_RUNS=2 TAO_IPC_MIN_MESSAGEPORT_MBPS=64 TAO_IPC_MAX_MESSAGEPORT_P99_CONTROL_MS=80 TAO_IPC_MAX_MESSAGEPORT_CONTROL_STALLS_16=8 TAO_IPC_MAX_MESSAGEPORT_DATA_STALLS_16=8 tsx bench/run-electron.ts bench/ipc-benchmark.ts

scripts.test:persistence: tsx --test src/main/taod-stream.test.ts src/main/taod-client-lifecycle.test.ts src/main/git-state-watcher.test.ts test/terminal-output-writer.test.ts test/workspace-service.test.ts
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm fmt:check && pnpm tsc
